metadata.credit: Pick order and tier list provided by Draftsim
metadata.author: Dan from Draftsim
metadata.rating_system_note: Pick order ranks are derived directly from Draftsim's published numeric ratings for WOE (https://draftsim.com/generated/WOE/WOE_*.js). Tier letters are mapped from rating: S>=4.0, A 3.5-3.9, B 3.0-3.4, C 2.5-2.9, D 2.0-2.4, F<2.0. All data belongs to Draftsim.

tier_key.S: Bomb — Near-game-winning card; take over almost any other card in the pack.
tier_key.A: Exceptional — Strong reason to be in its color; first-pick quality.
tier_key.D: Playable — Acceptable filler; plays a role in specific decks.
tier_key.F: Unplayable / Near-unplayable — Avoid unless no other options.

categories.description: Near-game-winning cards. Take over almost any other card in the pack. First-pick regardless of colors.
Exceptional cards. Strong reasons to be in their color and first-pick quality.
Powerful playables. Highly desirable cards for their archetype.

cards.name: Kellan, the Fae-Blooded
cards.type_line: Legendary Creature — Human Faerie // Sorcery — Adventure

categories.description: Good cards. Solid role-players and easy inclusions.

cards.name: Ferocious Werefox
cards.type_line: Creature — Elf Fox Warrior // Instant — Adventure

cards.name: Beluna Grandsquall
cards.type_line: Legendary Creature — Giant Noble // Instant — Adventure

categories.description: Playable cards. Acceptable filler that plays a role in specific decks.
Unplayable or near-unplayable cards. Avoid unless no other options.
